top_signals.title: Anubis ransomware claims Coca-Cola Fairlife attack, threatens data leak
top_signals.summary: The Anubis ransomware gang has claimed responsibility for the cyberattack on Coca-Cola's Fairlife dairy subsidiary, threatening to publish allegedly stolen corporate data unless the company pays a ransom. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Jack Mallers steps down as XXI Capital CEO as Tether's plans to merge three bitcoin firms falls
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Nakilat Profits Dinged by Region's War
top_signals.summary: Qatar Gas Transport Company Q.P.S.C. (Nakilat) announced its consolidated financial results for the first half of the year ended 30 June 2026, with a net profit of QAR 857 million compared to QAR 860 million for the corresponding period in 2025.Eng.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Policy paper: EM on customs duty on distance imported goods sales (C(2026)2760)
top_signals.summary: The government's summary of a Commission Delegated Regulation as regards elements related to the temporary customs duty on distance sales of imported goods.

top_signals.title: U.S. strikes continue, GM earnings, the latest on cyclosporiasis and more in Morning Squawk
top_signals.summary: Here are five key things investors need to know to start the trading day.

top_signals.title: India says allegedly leaked nuclear plant files pose no safety risk
top_signals.summary: Documents that the World Leaks cybercrime group claimed to leak from the Kudankulam Nuclear Power Plant do not contain information pertaining to safety or security, Indian officials said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: RippleX sees XRP Ledger agentic transactions hitting 10-million mark soon
top_signals.summary: Ripple recently joined x402 Foundation, serving as a premier member alongside Coinbase, Circle, and Visa.
